name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement

---

# Feature Summary

Provide a brief summary of the feature you'd like to see.

---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in as much detail as possible.

---

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

---

## Benefits

Explain how this feature would improve Flipnzee Analytics.

---

## Additional Information

Add mockups, screenshots, links, or any other context that may help explain your idea.
